name: ai-cli-orch-wrapper
description: Consent-gated external AI delegation wrapper for Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, and mock provider workflows.

scripts.test:fixtures: go build -o aco ./cmd/aco && npx tsx test/fixtures/harness.ts --binary ./aco
scripts.test:fixtures:node: npm run build --workspace=packages/wrapper && chmod +x packages/wrapper/dist/cli.js && npx tsx test/fixtures/harness.ts --binary packages/wrapper/dist/cli.js
scripts.test:scripts: bash test/scripts/project-id-validation.test.sh && bash test/scripts/terminology-check.test.sh && bash test/scripts/release-workflow.test.sh && npm run check:terminology
